mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, recipient_name, phone, postcode, address1, address2, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM shipping_addresses WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, member_id, recipient_name, phone, postcode, address1, address2, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM shipping_addresses WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_default = true

SELECT id, member_id, recipient_name, phone, postcode, address1, address2, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM shipping_addresses WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipping_addresses (member_id, recipient_name, phone, postcode, address1, address2, is_default, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{recipientName}, #{phone}, #{postcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE shipping_addresses SET recipient_name = #{recipientName}, phone = #{phone}, postcode = #{postcode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
